text:
Cursor 回应：承认用了开源基座舆论发酵后，Cursor 开发者体验副总裁 Lee Robinson 在 X 上做出了官方回应。
https://t.co/w5851OMk4r

他承认 Composer 2 确实基于一个开源基座模型构建，但强调最终模型只有约四分之一的算力来自基座，其余都是 Cursor 自己的训练。

他还表示 Cursor

1995 年，《仙剑奇侠传》横空出世，赵灵儿、李逍遥、水墨画风，把整个中文游戏圈炸了。所有人都在等续作。

结果一等就是八年。

2025 年 1 月，DeepSeek R1 发布，用极低成本训练出能和 OpenAI 掰手腕的推理模型，英伟达股价大跌，硅谷集体失眠。 https://t.co/hD8Tw0IfVh

This is a cool, practical technique for increasing AI idea diversity by adding random priming phrases & bits of end words

Similar prompts produce similar ideas, but since LLMs attend more to the start & end of inputs, this approach pushes towards novelty https://t.co/wwIPSRoFjs https://t.co/AcwGiCNzxo

Okay I have been converted to the Grok Imagine Chibi trend ✨

It makes every photo so cute. https://t.co/5neAbicTAJ

Happy Friday from New York! 

I hope you are creating some great stuff and remember: 

you are excellent! https://t.co/MtoV0HuQw0
